description: Report privacy-bounded Codex lifecycle activity to term-server.

hooks.command: sh -c 'if [ -n "${TERM_SERVER_EXECUTABLE:-}" ] && [ -n "${TERM_SERVER_SESSION:-}" ] && [ -n "${TERM_SERVER_BROKER_SOCKET:-}" ]; then "$TERM_SERVER_EXECUTABLE" --agent-event codex 2>/dev/null || true; else cat >/dev/null; fi'

sh -c 'if [ -n "${TERM_SERVER_EXECUTABLE:-}" ] && [ -n "${TERM_SERVER_SESSION:-}" ] && [ -n "${TERM_SERVER_BROKER_SOCKET:-}" ]; then "$TERM_SERVER_EXECUTABLE" --agent-event codex 2>/dev/null || true; else cat >/dev/null; fi'
